# stalwart_directory (Resource)

Manages a Stalwart authentication directory backend (the `Directory` JMAP object). Supports LDAP (`Ldap`) and OIDC (`Oidc`) directory types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "stalwart_directory" "ldap" {
  type        = "Ldap"
  description = "Corporate LDAP directory"

  url         = "ldap://auth.corp.example.com:389"
  base_dn     = "dc=corp,dc=example,dc=com"
  bind_dn     = "cn=readonly,dc=corp,dc=example,dc=com"
  bind_secret = var.ldap_bind_secret

  filter_login   = "(&(objectClass=inetOrgPerson)(uid=?))"
  filter_mailbox = "(&(objectClass=inetOrgPerson)(mail=?))"
  attr_email     = ["mail"]
}

# OIDC example:
# resource "stalwart_directory" "oidc" {
#   type           = "Oidc"
#   description    = "Corporate SSO"
#   issuer_url     = "https://sso.corp.example.com"
#   claim_username = "preferred_username"
# }

# Import an existing directory by its opaque id:
# terraform import stalwart_directory.ldap <opaque-id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the directory. Required and must be non-empty.
- `type` (String) Directory backend type: `Ldap` or `Oidc`. Changing the type replaces the directory.

### Optional

- `attr_description` (Set of String) LDAP attribute(s) containing a human-readable account description.
- `attr_email` (Set of String) LDAP attribute(s) containing email addresses.
- `attr_member_of` (Set of String) LDAP attribute(s) listing group memberships (`attrMemberOf` on the wire).
- `attr_secret` (Set of String) LDAP attribute(s) containing the account password hash.
- `base_dn` (String) Base distinguished name for LDAP searches, e.g. `dc=example,dc=com`. Required for `Ldap` type.
- `bind_dn` (String) Distinguished name used to bind to the LDAP server for lookups.
- `bind_secret` (String, Sensitive) Password for the LDAP bind DN. Write-only: the server never returns it, so out-of-band changes are not detected.
- `claim_username` (String) OIDC claim that contains the username, e.g. `preferred_username`.
- `filter_login` (String) LDAP filter template for login lookups, e.g. `(&(objectClass=inetOrgPerson)(uid=?))`.
- `filter_mailbox` (String) LDAP filter template for mailbox lookups, e.g. `(&(objectClass=inetOrgPerson)(mail=?))`.
- `issuer_url` (String) OIDC issuer URL, e.g. `https://auth.example.com`. Required for `Oidc` type.
- `require_scopes` (Set of String) OIDC scopes required for authentication.
- `url` (String) LDAP server URL, e.g. `ldap://auth.example.com:389`. Required for `Ldap` type.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the directory.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by opaque server-assigned id (directories have no stable human-readable id):
terraform import stalwart_directory.ldap <opaque-id>
```
